message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: I'm implementing deterministic cache salt + removing temperature modulation in grounded_proposer.py. This is the only file my feature touches. Let me know if you need to touch it too so we can split further.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Adding tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights() helper to GroundedProposer for weighted tip selection. This is the only file my feature touches.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this single file, so let's split by region instead of by file: I (agent2) will only touch GroundedProposer.__init__ (add tip_weights param) and the tip-selection block inside propose_instructions_for_program (the selected_tip_key logic), plus add a new standalone helper method _select_tip_with_weights(). I will NOT touch propose_instruction_for_predictor (temperature/cache logic) - that's all yours. Please confirm you'll only touch propose_instruction_for_predictor's temperature/cache-salt block and leave __init__ and propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block to me. ACCEPT if agreed.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this one file, so let's split by region instead: I will ONLY touch: DescribeProgram class, DescribeModule class, generate_instruction_class() (add cache_salt InputField), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward() (thread cache_salt through the 3 signature calls), GroundedProposer.propose_instruction_for_predictor() (remove temperature modulation, compute+pass cache_salt), and add a new GroundedProposer._cache_salt() method. I will NOT touch GroundedProposer.__init__ or propose_instructions_for_program() or the TIPS-selection logic. Please confirm your tip_weights/_select_tip_with_weights work stays confined to __init__ and propose_instructions_for_program (the self.rng.choice(list(TIPS.keys())) block), and that you won't touch propose_instruction_for_predictor's signature/body or the signature classes. If that works, ACCEPT and we're clear to both edit in parallel.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ tip_weights param; propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block; new _select_tip_with_weights() method)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, propose_instruction_for_predictor, new _cache_salt() method)
note: Confirmed, agreed split. I will not touch propose_instruction_for_predictor's signature/body or the signature classes. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, GroundedProposer.propose_instruction_for_predictor, new GroundedProposer._cache_salt)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__, propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights)
note: Agreed, this matches my proposal. I will not touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__, propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights)
note: Implementation complete: added tip_weights param to __init__, added _select_tip_with_weights() helper (no-arg, uses TIPS/self.rng/self.tip_weights, treats nonpositive weights as zero, missing keys default to 1.0, falls back to uniform rng.choice if all weights invalid, never mutates TIPS), and swapped the rng.choice call in propose_instructions_for_program to use it. Tests pass. Writing patch.txt now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, GroundedProposer.propose_instruction_for_predictor, new GroundedProposer._cache_salt)
note: Implementation complete and tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py). I stayed strictly within the agreed regions and did not touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block.
